criteria.name: AI-Powered Recommendations
criteria.description: The app provides personalized product recommendations based on user behavior, search queries, and shopping history.
criteria.sources: shopdev Shopping Assistant, Shopmate, Infichat, Verifast AI, Vanchat AI

criteria.name: Customer Support
criteria.description: The app offers 24/7 customer support through AI-powered chatbots, handling queries and providing instant assistance.

criteria.name: Product Search and Discovery
criteria.description: The app helps users find the right products by understanding their natural language queries and providing suggestions.

criteria.name: Personalization
criteria.description: The app adapts the shopping experience in real-time according to the visitor's interests and behavior.

criteria.name: AI-Driven Merchandising
criteria.description: The app uses AI-driven deep product tagging technology to enable merchandising strategies.

criteria.name: Customer Service Efficiency
criteria.description: The app streamlines customer service by analyzing past tickets and suggesting brand-friendly responses.

criteria.name: Upselling and Cross-selling
criteria.description: The app provides clickable nudges and smart popups to upsell and cross-sell products.

criteria.name: AI Chatbot Integration
criteria.description: The app features AI-powered chatbots to answer FAQs and recommend products based on shopping history.

criteria.name: Product information
criteria.description: The app provides detailed product information and summarize product reviews.
